name: /pr-source-remove archives the source evidence to pr-corpus/evidence/_archived/ folder before removing
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro pr-corpus/evidence && printf 'sources: []
operator_namespace: [{id: my-src}]
' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && printf 'source_id: my-src
related_prs: [1, 2]
' > pr-corpus/evidence/my-src.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-source-remove.sh" my-src --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml --evidence-dir pr-corpus/evidence --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && [ -f pr-corpus/evidence/_archived/my-src-2026-05-13T00-00-00Z.yaml ] && echo ok 1>&2
